category_sources: Official agent-sop repository describes Agent SOPs as markdown-based instruction sets for AI agents using natural language, parameterized inputs, and constraint-based execution.
source_facts.description says strands-agents-sops provides Standard Operating Procedures for AI agents using natural language.
display_name_sources: Official agent-sop README documents the strands-agents-sops command for Agent SOP workflows.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the main documentation surface for Agent SOPs and the strands-agents-sops tooling.
Official Strands Agents documentation references strands-agents-sops in the Eval SOP guide.
repo_sources: Official repository contains Python tooling and documents strands-agents-sops usage.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/strands-agents/agent-sop.
tags_sources: Official agent-sop README describes reusable AI-agent workflows and MCP/tooling distribution.
source_facts.description identifies SOPs for AI agents using natural language.
